textByHash.0e6b7fb4285200a54a3ca925d33df50bbd75610a: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having.
textByHash.158d4d06b871727f5d611b16fb8bb0aed0b58c8c: Do I know you? I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.181793f112c1e2bb805144024dd6547672362c2b: You! You're the one that just made everything worse for us poor villagers!
textByHash.1b9cbe29b687817e8147b27f46277380ad567d0f: If you're prepared to change something you must also be prepared to deal with the consequences! Now hurry up and fix this mess you created!
textByHash.2b7b8716b27e51a3017f63776ee2a4418b37da2d: I'm sorry, I can't help you there.
textByHash.2ce64d318d2a06724047019612f8bb37ddc22559: Do I have to spell it out to you?
textByHash.2d59138b7d0c09dcfa81b98774a8873bc73b1fe6: No, I have nothing I wish to get rid of. If you want to do some trading, there are plenty of shops and market stalls around though.
textByHash.4225ae44d7e2b5c5b42c6b153c0df00af6ec4ee9: All these newcomers - what are they up to?
textByHash.42c76f04d604f6946c37f8b3a1a4f1b9966e76bb: Thank you? For what? You come into our town. You rob, mug, burgle and kill and then expect respect and gratitude? Look, if it's praise and thanks you're looking for, talk to the mayor.
textByHash.4fd5c62c434f41cefeae21720b5d7f86d853c379: Who do you think is stronger? Our elderly mayor, or the leader of the bandits?
textByHash.62283b7477ce58f6a37ba10df434b3c3ffeefed3: Argh! Another one! No, I don't want to help with your scheme! I'm very busy!
textByHash.84453e5550ff775a7f7499a98ba6442d13c64ca8: The desert just outside of town is full of wolves, snakes, and even wild Ugthanki. Try there.
textByHash.953ce83e112e870451c671aa9f1db2d802472eef: You adventurers! You never think, you just act. You think that by killing a powerful bad person, Gielinor will become a better place.
textByHash.ab666ca25a8c486a9d71cf297d1589edde49e153: Just run the bandits out of town. Incidentally, I spotted their leader to the north-west just a few minutes ago.
textByHash.b4c72e4429af5b5904dd59620da81eca800a3fc0: Now that the balance is lost, the Bandits reign unopposed! They no longer have to deal with the Menaphites and heap misery upon misery on us. You must finish the job that you have started.
textByHash.c3c2a1a9f1d9115303cfe97ad962d0e6836c1349: Sorry, I thought you were a bandit.
textByHash.d411d4e1b59e58ce923d0865c366bcb9d1caa68d: Yes. Before your intervention the two gangs pretty much cancelled each other out. They spent most of their energy trying to kill each other.
textByHash.dac0027e2dc3c10247f9cc38722fd90b1fe4dc09: It's not that simple, things never are. You've created a vacuum, and now all that power will go to whoever's strong enough to take it.
textByHash.e6d0ce5f6e87fefd07fc66e4a00a06b6e9490845: Get out of my way, I'm in a hurry!
